zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas De Townshend於1360年出生時，他的父親Sir Roger De Townshende35歲，母親Catherine Atherton29歲。他和Agnes Alice Payne至少有2個兒子。他去世於1421年4月1日在英國英格蘭倫敦享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 雷納姆。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Townshend
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Townsend
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived at the extremity of a village, from Middle English toun(es)ende. Compare Town . There may have been some confusion with Townson .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas De Townshend was born in 1360, his father, Sir Roger De Townshende, was 35 and his mother, Catherine Atherton, was 29. He had at least 2 sons with Agnes Alice Payne. He died on 1 April 1421, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in East Raynham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas De Townshend est né en 1360, son père, Sir Roger De Townshende, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Catherine Atherton, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Agnes Alice Payne. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1421, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à East Raynham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Townshendが1360年に生まれた時，父Sir Roger De Townshendeは35歳，母Catherine Athertonは29歳であった。彼はAgnes Alice Payneとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1421年4月1日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト レインハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Townshend(이)가 1360년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger De Townshende(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Atherton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Agnes Alice Payne(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1421년 4월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 라이함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas De Townshend nasceu em 1360, seu pai, Sir Roger De Townshende, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Atherton, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Agnes Alice Payne. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1421, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em East Raynham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas De Townshend родился в 1360 г., его отцу по имени Sir Roger De Townshende было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Atherton, 29. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Agnes Alice Payne. Он умер 1 апреля 1421 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности эаст реинам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
